reasoning: Today, we're focusing on improving your lactate clearance and aerobic base, which are crucial for maintaining power over the long Sundance to Cascade Springs climb on the Alpine Loop. Your last ride was moderate in effort, ideal for setting you up for a more demanding session today. Over-unders will help mimic race pace demands and build fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Include 5 sets of 6-minute blocks: 2 min at 218W (over) followed by 4 min at 201W (under)

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
